holdings.infoBox: IJH is an equity ETF with a total of 413 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at N/A, Twilio at N/A, Curtiss-Wright at N/A, Carpenter Technology at N/A, and TechnipFMC at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares Core S&P Mid-Cap ETF (IJH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of mid-cap US companies. IJH was launched on May 22, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Mid-Cap Index Funds Aren't All Alike. Look Under the Hood.
data.text: CFRA found big discrepancies among the returns of the market's three largest mid-cap ETFs.

data.title: Small-cap and midcap ETFs charge higher as investors continue to rotate
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to smaller companies outperformed Tuesday, extending a winning streak that suggests investors may be ready to look beyond the behemoths that have dominated markets ...

data.title: ‘Goldilocks' funds? Midcap ETFs may be about to have their moment
data.text: Midcap stocks offer some of what makes small-caps appealing and some of what makes large-caps appealing, and may be timed perfectly for the rotation.

data.title: Why iShares fee cuts are 'a huge win for investors': CFRA
data.text: With iShares lowering fees on three of its prominent exchange-traded funds, investors can now get "nearly free exposure" to funds dominating their asset categories, said Todd Rosenbluth, senior direct...

data.title: What iShares fee cuts mean for ETFs: CFRA
data.text: Todd Rosenbluth, senior director of ETF and mutual fund research at CFRA, breaks down the significance of iShares cutting fees for some of its ETFs. With CNBC's Frank Holland.
